Per-organization view of all externally observed IPs, domains, and ASNs cross-referenced with Whisper threat scores.

properties.serializedData:
{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Whisper Security - External Attack Surface Overview
This workbook maps the external attack surface using infrastructure context data from the Whisper Security knowledge graph. Review ASN prefix distribution, nameserver patterns, SPF and DNSSEC adoption rates, and a complete inventory of monitored assets."},"name":"header-markdown"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where isnotempty(asns)
| mv-expand ASN = split(asns, ',')
| extend ASN = tostring(trim(' ', tostring(ASN)))
| where isnotempty(ASN)
| mv-expand AsnName = split(asnNames, ',')
| extend AsnName = tostring(trim(' ', tostring(AsnName)))
| mv-expand Prefix = split(prefixes, ',')
| extend Prefix = tostring(trim(' ', tostring(Prefix)))
| where isnotempty(Prefix)
| summarize PrefixCount = dcount(Prefix), IndicatorCount = dcount(indicator) by ASN, AsnName
| order by PrefixCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"ASN Prefix Distribution (Top 20 ASNs)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart","chartSettings":{"xAxis":"ASN","yAxis":["PrefixCount"],"seriesLabelSettings":[{"series":"PrefixCount","label":"Prefix Count"}]}},"name":"asn-prefix-map"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where indicatorType == 'domain'
| where isnotempty(nameservers)
| mv-expand NS = split(nameservers, ',')
| extend NS = tostring(trim(' ', tostring(NS)))
| where isnotempty(NS)
| extend NSProvider = extract(@'([^.]+\.[^.]+)$', 1, NS)
| summarize DomainCount = dcount(indicator) by NSProvider
| order by DomainCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Nameserver Distribution by Provider","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"nameserver-distribution"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where indicatorType == 'domain'
| extend HasSPF = isnotempty(spfIncludes)
| extend HasDNSSEC = isnotempty(dnssecAlgorithm)
| summarize TotalDomains = count(), SPFEnabled = countif(HasSPF), DNSSECEnabled = countif(HasDNSSEC)
| extend SPFPercentage = round(100.0 * SPFEnabled / TotalDomains, 1), DNSSECPercentage = round(100.0 * DNSSECEnabled / TotalDomains, 1)
| project Category = pack_array('SPF Configured', 'SPF Missing', 'DNSSEC Enabled', 'DNSSEC Missing'), Count = pack_array(SPFEnabled, TotalDomains - SPFEnabled, DNSSECEnabled, TotalDomains - DNSSECEnabled)
| mv-expand Category to typeof(string), Count to typeof(long)","size":0,"title":"SPF and DNSSEC Coverage Statistics","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"categoricalbar"},"name":"spf-dnssec-coverage"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperInfraContext_CL
| extend ASN = tostring(split(asns, ',')[0])
| extend AsnName = tostring(split(asnNames, ',')[0])
| extend Country = tostring(split(countries, ',')[0])
| project indicator, indicatorType, ASN, AsnName, Country, registrar, nameservers, domainAge, cohostedCount, dnssecAlgorithm, spfIncludes, bgpStatus
| order by indicatorType asc, indicator asc","size":0,"title":"Attack Surface Inventory","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"cohostedCount","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}},{"columnMatch":"domainAge","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen"}}]}},"name":"attack-surface-inventory"}],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-ExternalAttackSurfaceOverviewWorkbook"}

properties.description: @{workbookKey=ExternalAttackSurfaceOverviewWorkbook; logoFileName=whisper-logo.png; description=Per-organization view of all externally observed IPs, domains, and ASNs cross-referenced with Whisper threat scores.; dataTypesDependencies=System.Object[]; dataConnectorsDependencies=System.Object[]; previewImagesFileNames=System.Object[]; version=1.0.0; title=Whisper - External Attack Surface Overview; templateRelativePath=ExternalAttackSurfaceOverview.json; subtitle=; provider=Whisper Security; source=; author=; support=; categories=; lastPublishDate=2026-06-04}.description

metadata.description: Network-wide threat landscape across ingested Whisper threat intelligence and infrastructure context.

properties.serializedData:
{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Whisper Security - Infrastructure Threat Landscape
This workbook provides visibility into threat intelligence data enriched by the Whisper Security knowledge graph. Use the visualizations below to monitor geographic distribution of threats, ASN reputation, threat category breakdowns, score distributions, trends over time, and top contributing threat feeds."},"name":"header-markdown"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperThreatIntel_CL
| where isThreat == true
| join kind=inner (WhisperInfraContext_CL | project indicator, countries) on indicator
| extend Country = tostring(split(countries, ',')[0])
| where isnotempty(Country)
| summarize ThreatCount = count() by Country
| order by ThreatCount desc","size":0,"title":"World Map of Threat-Listed IPs by Country","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"map","mapSettings":{"locInfo":"CountryRegion","locInfoColumn":"Country","sizeSettings":"ThreatCount","sizeAggregation":"Sum","legendMetric":"ThreatCount","legendAggregation":"Sum","itemColorSettings":{"nodeColorField":"ThreatCount","colorAggregation":"Sum","type":"heatmap","heatmapPalette":"greenRed"}}},"name":"threat-world-map"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperASNReputation_CL
| where isnotempty(asnName)
| top 10 by maxThreatScore desc
| project asnName, reputationScore, maxThreatScore, avgThreatScore, prefixCount, hasThreateningPrefixes
| order by maxThreatScore desc","size":0,"title":"ASN Reputation Heatmap (Top 10 by Max Threat Score)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"maxThreatScore","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}},{"columnMatch":"avgThreatScore","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}},{"columnMatch":"reputationScore","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen"}}]}},"name":"asn-reputation-heatmap"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperThreatIntel_CL
| where isThreat == true
| summarize Malware = countif(isMalware == true), C2 = countif(isC2 == true), Phishing = countif(isPhishing == true), Tor = countif(isTor == true), Spam = countif(isSpam == true), Bruteforce = countif(isBruteforce == true), Scanner = countif(isScanner == true), Anonymizer = countif(isAnonymizer == true)
| evaluate narrow()
| project Category = Column, Count = Value","size":0,"title":"Threat Category Distribution","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"categoricalbar"},"name":"threat-category-distribution"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperThreatIntel_CL
| where isnotempty(threatScore)
| extend ScoreBucket = case(
    threatScore < 10, '0-9',
    threatScore < 20, '10-19',
    threatScore < 30, '20-29',
    threatScore < 40, '30-39',
    threatScore < 50, '40-49',
    threatScore < 60, '50-59',
    threatScore < 70, '60-69',
    threatScore < 80, '70-79',
    threatScore < 90, '80-89',
    '90-100')
| summarize IndicatorCount = count() by ScoreBucket
| order by ScoreBucket asc","size":0,"title":"Threat Score Distribution Histogram","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"threat-score-histogram"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperThreatIntel_CL
| where isThreat == true
| where isnotempty(lastSeen)
| summarize NewIndicators = dcount(indicator) by bin(lastSeen, 1d)
| order by lastSeen asc","size":0,"title":"Time-Series Trend of New Threat Indicators","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"threat-trend-timeseries"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperThreatIntel_CL
| where isThreat == true
| where isnotempty(feedNames)
| mv-expand FeedName = split(feedNames, ',')
| extend FeedName = tostring(trim(' ', tostring(FeedName)))
| where isnotempty(FeedName)
| summarize IndicatorCount = dcount(indicator) by FeedName
| top 15 by IndicatorCount desc","size":0,"title":"Top Threat Feed Sources by Indicator Count","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"top-feed-sources"}],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-InfrastructureThreatLandscapeWorkbook"}

properties.description: @{workbookKey=InfrastructureThreatLandscapeWorkbook; logoFileName=whisper-logo.png; description=Network-wide threat landscape across ingested Whisper threat intelligence and infrastructure context.; dataTypesDependencies=System.Object[]; dataConnectorsDependencies=System.Object[]; previewImagesFileNames=System.Object[]; version=1.0.0; title=Whisper - Infrastructure Threat Landscape; templateRelativePath=InfrastructureThreatLandscape.json; subtitle=; provider=Whisper Security; source=; author=; support=; categories=; lastPublishDate=2026-06-04}.description

metadata.description: Continuous ASN reputation tracking with degradation alerts.

properties.serializedData:
{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Whisper Security - ASN Reputation Monitoring
This workbook tracks ASN reputation over time using threat intelligence from the Whisper Security knowledge graph. Monitor reputation trends, identify degradation events, analyze prefix threat density, and review the ASNs with the most significant reputation declines."},"name":"header-markdown"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperASNReputation_CL
| where isnotempty(asnName)
| summarize AvgReputation = avg(reputationScore), MaxThreat = max(maxThreatScore) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), asnName
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"ASN Reputation Trend Over Time","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"reputation-trend"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperASNReputation_CL
| where isnotempty(asnName)
| order by asnName asc, TimeGenerated asc
| serialize
| extend PrevScore = prev(reputationScore), PrevAsn = prev(asnName)
| where asnName == PrevAsn and isnotempty(PrevScore)
| extend ScoreDrop = PrevScore - reputationScore
| where ScoreDrop > 5
| project TimeGenerated, asn, asnName, PreviousScore = PrevScore, CurrentScore = reputationScore, ScoreDrop, maxThreatScore, hasThreateningPrefixes
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Reputation Degradation Alert Timeline","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ScoreDrop","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}},{"columnMatch":"CurrentScore","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen"}}]}},"name":"degradation-timeline"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperASNReputation_CL
| where isnotempty(asnName)
| summarize AvgThreat = avg(avgThreatScore), TotalPrefixes = max(prefixCount) by asnName, country
| extend ThreatDensity = iff(TotalPrefixes > 0, round(AvgThreat * TotalPrefixes / 100.0, 2), 0.0)
| order by ThreatDensity desc
| take 25","size":0,"title":"Prefix Threat Density Heatmap","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ThreatDensity","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}},{"columnMatch":"AvgThreat","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}}]}},"name":"prefix-threat-density"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperASNReputation_CL
| where isnotempty(asnName)
| summarize EarliestScore = arg_min(TimeGenerated, reputationScore), LatestScore = arg_max(TimeGenerated, reputationScore) by asn, asnName, country
| extend ScoreChange = LatestScore_reputationScore - EarliestScore_reputationScore
| where ScoreChange < 0
| project asn, asnName, country, EarliestScore = EarliestScore_reputationScore, LatestScore = LatestScore_reputationScore, ScoreChange
| order by ScoreChange asc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Top Degraded ASNs","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ScoreChange","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}},{"columnMatch":"LatestScore","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen"}}]}},"name":"top-degraded-asns"}],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-AsnReputationMonitoringWorkbook"}

properties.description: @{workbookKey=AsnReputationMonitoringWorkbook; logoFileName=whisper-logo.png; description=Continuous ASN reputation tracking with degradation alerts.; dataTypesDependencies=System.Object[]; dataConnectorsDependencies=System.Object[]; previewImagesFileNames=System.Object[]; version=1.0.0; title=Whisper - ASN Reputation Monitoring; templateRelativePath=AsnReputationMonitoring.json; subtitle=; provider=Whisper Security; source=; author=; support=; categories=; lastPublishDate=2026-06-04}.description

metadata.description: Detects anomalies in domain registration patterns using Whisper WHOIS history.

properties.serializedData:
{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Whisper Security - Domain Registration Anomaly
This workbook surfaces anomalous domain registration patterns detected through the Whisper Security knowledge graph. Review newly registered domains, registrar change timelines, age distributions, WHOIS privacy rates, and upcoming expirations to identify potential threats."},"name":"header-markdown"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where indicatorType == 'domain'
| where isnotempty(domainAge)
| where domainAge < 7
| project indicator, domainAge, registrar, registrant, countries, nameservers, cohostedCount
| order by domainAge asc","size":0,"title":"Newly Registered Domains (Age Less Than 7 Days)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"domainAge","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen"}}]}},"name":"newly-registered-domains"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperHistory_CL
| where indicatorType == 'domain'
| where isnotempty(registrar)
| order by indicator asc, snapshotDate asc
| serialize
| extend PrevRegistrar = prev(registrar), PrevIndicator = prev(indicator)
| where indicator == PrevIndicator and registrar != PrevRegistrar
| project snapshotDate, indicator, PreviousRegistrar = PrevRegistrar, NewRegistrar = registrar, country
| order by snapshotDate desc","size":0,"title":"Registrar Change Timeline","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"registrar-change-timeline"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where indicatorType == 'domain'
| where isnotempty(domainAge)
| extend AgeBucket = case(
    domainAge < 7, 'Less than 7 days',
    domainAge < 30, '7 to 30 days',
    domainAge < 365, '30 to 365 days',
    domainAge < 1825, '1 to 5 years',
    'Over 5 years')
| summarize DomainCount = count() by AgeBucket
| order by DomainCount desc","size":0,"title":"Domain Age Distribution","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"categoricalbar"},"name":"domain-age-distribution"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperHistory_CL
| where indicatorType == 'domain'
| where isnotempty(registrant)
| extend IsRedacted = iff(registrant has_any ('redacted', 'privacy', 'proxy', 'whoisguard', 'protected', 'withheld', 'not disclosed'), true, false)
| summarize TotalDomains = dcount(indicator), RedactedDomains = dcountif(indicator, IsRedacted == true)
| extend VisibleDomains = TotalDomains - RedactedDomains
| project Category = pack_array('Redacted or Privacy', 'Visible Registration'), Count = pack_array(RedactedDomains, VisibleDomains)
| mv-expand Category to typeof(string), Count to typeof(long)","size":0,"title":"WHOIS Privacy and Redaction Rates","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"whois-privacy-rates"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"WhisperHistory_CL
| where indicatorType == 'domain'
| where isnotempty(expiryDate)
| where expiryDate > now() and expiryDate < now() + 30d
| summarize arg_max(snapshotDate, *) by indicator
| extend DaysUntilExpiry = datetime_diff('day', expiryDate, now())
| project indicator, expiryDate, DaysUntilExpiry, registrar, registrant, country
| order by DaysUntilExpiry asc","size":0,"title":"Domains with Expiring Registrations (Next 30 Days)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"DaysUntilExpiry","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen"}}]}},"name":"expiring-domains"}],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-DomainRegistrationAnomalyWorkbook"}

properties.description: @{workbookKey=DomainRegistrationAnomalyWorkbook; logoFileName=whisper-logo.png; description=Detects anomalies in domain registration patterns using Whisper WHOIS history.; dataTypesDependencies=System.Object[]; dataConnectorsDependencies=System.Object[]; previewImagesFileNames=System.Object[]; version=1.0.0; title=Whisper - Domain Registration Anomaly; templateRelativePath=DomainRegistrationAnomaly.json; subtitle=; provider=Whisper Security; source=; author=; support=; categories=; lastPublishDate=2026-06-04}.description

metadata.description: Audit of which Sentinel incidents have been enriched with Whisper data.

properties.serializedData:
{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Whisper Security - Incident Enrichment Audit
This workbook provides operational visibility into the Whisper Security enrichment playbooks running in Microsoft Sentinel. Track success and failure rates, monitor latency percentiles, review enrichment volume trends, and investigate error patterns to ensure reliable threat intelligence enrichment."},"name":"header-markdown"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.LOGIC'
| where resource_workflowName_s has 'Whisper'
| where status_s in ('Succeeded', 'Failed')
| summarize Succeeded = countif(status_s == 'Succeeded'), Failed = countif(status_s == 'Failed') by resource_workflowName_s
| extend Total = Succeeded + Failed
| extend SuccessRate = round(100.0 * Succeeded / Total, 1)
| project PlaybookName = resource_workflowName_s, Succeeded, Failed, Total, SuccessRate
| order by Total desc","size":0,"title":"Enrichment Playbook Success and Failure Rates","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"SuccessRate","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen"}},{"columnMatch":"Failed","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}}]}},"name":"success-failure-rates"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.LOGIC'
| where resource_workflowName_s has 'Whisper'
| where status_s == 'Succeeded'
| where isnotempty(duration_s)
| extend DurationMs = toreal(extract(@'(\d+\.?\d*)', 1, duration_s))
| summarize P50 = percentile(DurationMs, 50), P90 = percentile(DurationMs, 90), P95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95), P99 = percentile(DurationMs, 99) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Enrichment Latency Percentiles Over Time","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"latency-percentiles"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.LOGIC'
| where resource_workflowName_s has 'Whisper'
| where status_s in ('Succeeded', 'Failed')
| summarize EnrichmentCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), status_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Enrichment Volume Over Time","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"enrichment-volume"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.LOGIC'
| where resource_workflowName_s has 'Whisper'
| where status_s == 'Failed'
| extend ErrorCode = coalesce(error_code_s, code_s, 'Unknown')
| extend ErrorMessage = coalesce(error_message_s, 'No message available')
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by resource_workflowName_s, ErrorCode, ErrorMessage
| order by ErrorCount desc","size":0,"title":"Error Breakdown by Playbook and Error Type","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ErrorCount","formatter":8,"formatOptions":{"palette":"greenRed"}}]}},"name":"error-breakdown"}],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-IncidentEnrichmentAuditWorkbook"}

properties.description: @{workbookKey=IncidentEnrichmentAuditWorkbook; logoFileName=whisper-logo.png; description=Audit of which Sentinel incidents have been enriched with Whisper data.; dataTypesDependencies=System.Object[]; dataConnectorsDependencies=System.Object[]; previewImagesFileNames=System.Object[]; version=1.0.0; title=Whisper - Incident Enrichment Audit; templateRelativePath=IncidentEnrichmentAudit.json; subtitle=; provider=Whisper Security; source=; author=; support=; categories=; lastPublishDate=2026-06-04}.description
C2CommunicationDetection_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.28
Detects command-and-control communication by joining CommonSecurityLog with Whisper threat intelligence data. Fires when network traffic matches a known C2 indicator with a threat score above 60.
TorExitNodeCommunication_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.28

Identifies network traffic communicating with known Tor exit nodes. While Tor usage may be legitimate in some environments, unexpected Tor communication can indicate data exfiltration, C2 tunneling, or policy violations.
properties.displayName: Whisper Security - Tor Exit Node Communication
Whisper Security - Tor Exit Node Communication

properties.description: Identifies newly registered domains (under 7 days old) hosted on autonomous systems with elevated threat scores. This combination often indicates adversary infrastructure staging for phishing, malware delivery, or C2 operations.
properties.displayName: Whisper Security - Newly Registered Domain on Threat ASN
Whisper Security - Newly Registered Domain on Threat ASN

properties.description: CoHostedMalwareCluster_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.28

Identifies IP addresses that host multiple domains associated with malware. When an IP has more than 3 co-hosted domains and at least 3 of those domains are flagged as malware by Whisper threat intelligence, it strongly indicates compromised or adversary-controlled infrastructure.
properties.displayName: Whisper Security - Co-Hosted Malware Cluster Detection
Whisper Security - Co-Hosted Malware Cluster Detection

properties.description: AsnReputationDegradation_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.28

Detects autonomous systems whose reputation score has increased by more than 20 points in the last 24 hours. Higher scores indicate worse reputation, so a score increase signals degradation that may indicate adversary use of the network.
Detects BGP origin AS changes for IP prefixes correlated with network traffic volume spikes. May indicate BGP hijacking or adversary-in-the-middle attacks.
properties.displayName: Whisper Security - BGP Route Anomaly with Traffic Spike
properties.query:
// MITRE ATT&CK: T1557 - Adversary-in-the-Middle
// Tactic: Collection
// Detects BGP route origin changes correlated with traffic volume anomalies
let lookbackPeriod = 1d;
let bgpChanges = WhisperHistory_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookbackPeriod)
    | where isnotempty(bgpOrigin)
    | serialize
    | extend PreviousOrigin = prev(bgpOrigin), PreviousIndicator = prev(indicator)
    | where indicator == PreviousIndicator
    | where bgpOrigin != PreviousOrigin
    | where isnotempty(PreviousOrigin)
    | project indicator, bgpPrefix, OldOrigin = PreviousOrigin, NewOrigin = bgpOrigin, ChangeTime = snapshotDate;
let CommonSecurityLogSafe = union isfuzzy=true CommonSecurityLog, (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, DestinationIP:string, SentBytes:long, ReceivedBytes:long)[]);
let trafficBaseline = CommonSecurityLogSafe
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookbackPeriod)
    | where isnotempty(DestinationIP)
    | summarize BaselineBytes = avg(SentBytes + ReceivedBytes), BaselineCount = count() by DestinationIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
    | summarize AvgBaselineBytes = avg(BaselineBytes), AvgBaselineCount = avg(BaselineCount) by DestinationIP;
let recentTraffic = CommonSecurityLogSafe
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
    | where isnotempty(DestinationIP)
    | summarize RecentBytes = sum(SentBytes + ReceivedBytes), RecentCount = count() by DestinationIP;
recentTraffic
    | join kind=inner (trafficBaseline) on DestinationIP
    | where RecentBytes > AvgBaselineBytes * 3 or RecentCount > AvgBaselineCount * 3
    | extend TrafficChange = iff(AvgBaselineBytes > 0, round((RecentBytes - AvgBaselineBytes) / AvgBaselineBytes * 100, 2), 0.0)
    | join kind=inner (bgpChanges) on $left.DestinationIP == $right.indicator
    | project TimeGenerated = ChangeTime, IPAddress = DestinationIP, Prefix = bgpPrefix, OriginASN = NewOrigin, OldOriginASN = OldOrigin, TrafficChange, RecentBytes, AvgBaselineBytes

properties.displayName: Whisper Security - BGP Route Anomaly with Traffic Spike

properties.description: Detects domains whose registrar has changed across WHOIS history snapshots within the last 30 days. Registrar changes may indicate domain hijacking or adversary infrastructure acquisition.
properties.displayName: Whisper Security - Domain Registrar Change Anomaly
properties.query:
// MITRE ATT&CK: T1584 - Compromise Infrastructure
// Tactic: Resource Development
// Detects registrar changes across WHOIS history snapshots
let lookbackPeriod = 30d;
WhisperHistory_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookbackPeriod)
    | where indicatorType == "domain"
    | where isnotempty(registrar)
    | summarize Registrars = make_set(registrar), SnapshotCount = count(), EarliestSnapshot = min(snapshotDate), LatestSnapshot = max(snapshotDate) by indicator
    | where array_length(Registrars) > 1
    | mv-expand CurrentRegistrar = Registrars
    | extend CurrentRegistrar = tostring(CurrentRegistrar)
    | join kind=inner (
        WhisperHistory_CL
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookbackPeriod)
        | where indicatorType == "domain"
        | where isnotempty(registrar)
        | serialize
        | extend PreviousRegistrar = prev(registrar), PreviousIndicator = prev(indicator)
        | where indicator == PreviousIndicator
        | where registrar != PreviousRegistrar
        | where isnotempty(PreviousRegistrar)
        | project indicator, OldRegistrar = PreviousRegistrar, NewRegistrar = registrar, ChangeDate = snapshotDate
    ) on indicator
    | project TimeGenerated = ChangeDate, DnsDomain = indicator, OldRegistrar, NewRegistrar, ChangeDate, SnapshotCount
    | distinct TimeGenerated, DnsDomain, OldRegistrar, NewRegistrar, ChangeDate, SnapshotCount

properties.displayName: Whisper Security - Domain Registrar Change Anomaly

properties.description: Detects new SPF include directives on monitored domains that were not seen in the previous scan window. Unauthorized SPF modifications may allow adversaries to send phishing emails that pass SPF checks.
properties.displayName: Whisper Security - SPF Record Unauthorized Include Detection
Whisper Security - SPF Record Unauthorized Include Detection

properties.description: AttackSurfaceDiscovery_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.28

properties.query:
// MITRE ATT&CK: T1046 - Network Service Discovery
// Tactic: Discovery
// Enumerates external attack surface by joining infrastructure context
// with threat intelligence scores to produce a prioritized risk inventory.
let lookback = 30d;
WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
| join kind=leftouter (
    WhisperThreatIntel_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
    | project indicator, threatScore, threatLevel, feedNames
) on indicator
| project
    indicator,
    indicatorType,
    asns,
    asnNames,
    countries,
    cohostedCount,
    domainAge,
    threatScore = coalesce(threatScore, real(0)),
    threatLevel = coalesce(threatLevel, "unknown"),
    feedNames = coalesce(feedNames, "none")
| sort by threatScore desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Enumerates all external IPs, domains, and ASNs from WhisperInfraContext_CL cross-referenced with threat scores from WhisperThreatIntel_CL, producing a prioritized risk inventory.

properties.description: NewlyRegisteredDomainHunt_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.28

properties.query:
// MITRE ATT&CK: T1583.001 - Resource Development: Acquire Infrastructure: Domains
// Tactic: ResourceDevelopment
// Finds newly registered domains (age < 14 days) and enriches with
// threat intelligence context to identify suspicious new domains.
let lookback = 30d;
let maxDomainAgeDays = 14;
WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where domainAge >= 0 and domainAge < maxDomainAgeDays
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
| join kind=leftouter (
    WhisperThreatIntel_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
    | project indicator, threatScore, threatLevel, isThreat, feedNames, isPhishing, isMalware
) on indicator
| project
    indicator,
    domainAge,
    registrar,
    registrant,
    countries,
    nameservers,
    ipAddresses,
    asns,
    asnNames,
    threatScore = coalesce(threatScore, real(0)),
    threatLevel = coalesce(threatLevel, "unknown"),
    isThreat = coalesce(isThreat, false),
    feedNames = coalesce(feedNames, "none"),
    isPhishing = coalesce(isPhishing, false),
    isMalware = coalesce(isMalware, false)
| sort by threatScore desc, domainAge asc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Finds newly registered domains (age less than 14 days) and enriches with threat intelligence to identify suspicious new domains.

properties.query:
// MITRE ATT&CK: T1583.003 - Resource Development: Acquire Infrastructure: Virtual Private Server
// Tactic: ResourceDevelopment
// Groups indicators by shared infrastructure attributes (ASN, prefix,
// registrar, nameserver) and identifies clusters with elevated threat scores.
let lookback = 30d;
let minClusterSize = 3;
let minAvgThreatScore = 30;
let infraWithThreats = WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
| join kind=leftouter (
    WhisperThreatIntel_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
    | project indicator, threatScore, threatLevel, isThreat
) on indicator
| extend threatScore = coalesce(threatScore, real(0));
let asnClusters = infraWithThreats
| where isnotempty(asns)
| summarize
    clusterIndicators = make_set(indicator, 100),
    indicatorCount = dcount(indicator),
    avgThreatScore = avg(threatScore),
    maxThreatScore = max(threatScore),
    threatCount = countif(isThreat == true)
    by clusterKey = asns
| extend clusterType = "ASN"
| where indicatorCount >= minClusterSize and avgThreatScore >= minAvgThreatScore;
let registrarClusters = infraWithThreats
| where isnotempty(registrar)
| summarize
    clusterIndicators = make_set(indicator, 100),
    indicatorCount = dcount(indicator),
    avgThreatScore = avg(threatScore),
    maxThreatScore = max(threatScore),
    threatCount = countif(isThreat == true)
    by clusterKey = registrar
| extend clusterType = "Registrar"
| where indicatorCount >= minClusterSize and avgThreatScore >= minAvgThreatScore;
let nameserverClusters = infraWithThreats
| where isnotempty(nameservers)
| summarize
    clusterIndicators = make_set(indicator, 100),
    indicatorCount = dcount(indicator),
    avgThreatScore = avg(threatScore),
    maxThreatScore = max(threatScore),
    threatCount = countif(isThreat == true)
    by clusterKey = nameservers
| extend clusterType = "Nameserver"
| where indicatorCount >= minClusterSize and avgThreatScore >= minAvgThreatScore;
union asnClusters, registrarClusters, nameserverClusters
| project
    clusterType,
    clusterKey,
    indicatorCount,
    avgThreatScore,
    maxThreatScore,
    threatCount,
    clusterIndicators
| sort by avgThreatScore desc, indicatorCount desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Discovers threat actor infrastructure clusters by grouping indicators by shared ASN, prefix, registrar, or nameserver with elevated threat scores.

properties.query:
// MITRE ATT&CK: T1583 - Resource Development: Acquire Infrastructure
// Tactic: ResourceDevelopment
// Pivots from known-malicious indicators to discover related threat
// infrastructure sharing ASNs, IP addresses, or registrars.
let lookback = 30d;
let threatThreshold = 50;
let maliciousIndicators = WhisperThreatIntel_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where isThreat == true and threatScore >= threatThreshold
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
| project indicator, threatScore, threatLevel, feedNames;
let infraAttributes = maliciousIndicators
| join kind=inner (
    WhisperInfraContext_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
) on indicator
| project indicator, threatScore, asns, ipAddresses, registrar;
let sharedAsns = infraAttributes
| where isnotempty(asns)
| mv-expand asnValue = split(asns, ",")
| extend asnValue = tostring(asnValue)
| join kind=inner (
    WhisperInfraContext_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
    | where isnotempty(asns)
    | mv-expand asnValue = split(asns, ",")
    | extend asnValue = tostring(asnValue)
) on asnValue
| where indicator != indicator1
| project pivotType = "SharedASN", sourceIndicator = indicator, pivotValue = asnValue, relatedIndicator = indicator1;
let sharedRegistrars = infraAttributes
| where isnotempty(registrar)
| join kind=inner (
    WhisperInfraContext_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
    | where isnotempty(registrar)
) on registrar
| where indicator != indicator1
| project pivotType = "SharedRegistrar", sourceIndicator = indicator, pivotValue = registrar, relatedIndicator = indicator1;
union sharedAsns, sharedRegistrars
| join kind=leftouter (
    WhisperThreatIntel_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
    | project indicator, relatedThreatScore = threatScore, relatedThreatLevel = threatLevel
) on $left.relatedIndicator == $right.indicator
| project
    sourceIndicator,
    pivotType,
    pivotValue,
    relatedIndicator,
    relatedThreatScore = coalesce(relatedThreatScore, real(0)),
    relatedThreatLevel = coalesce(relatedThreatLevel, "unknown")
| sort by relatedThreatScore desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Pivots from known-malicious indicators to discover related threat infrastructure sharing ASNs, IP addresses, or registrars.

properties.description: DomainToAsnMigration_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.28

properties.query:
// MITRE ATT&CK: T1583.001 - Resource Development: Acquire Infrastructure: Domains
// Tactic: ResourceDevelopment
// Detects domains that changed hosting ASN between time windows,
// indicating potential threat actor infrastructure migration.
let lookback = 30d;
let recentWindow = 7d;
let olderRecords = WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback) and TimeGenerated <= ago(recentWindow)
| where isnotempty(asns)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
| project indicator, oldAsns = asns, oldAsnNames = asnNames, oldTimestamp = TimeGenerated;
let recentRecords = WhisperInfraContext_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(recentWindow)
| where isnotempty(asns)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
| project indicator, newAsns = asns, newAsnNames = asnNames, newTimestamp = TimeGenerated;
olderRecords
| join kind=inner (recentRecords) on indicator
| where oldAsns != newAsns
| join kind=leftouter (
    WhisperThreatIntel_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by indicator
    | project indicator, threatScore, threatLevel, isThreat
) on indicator
| project
    indicator,
    oldAsns,
    oldAsnNames,
    oldTimestamp,
    newAsns,
    newAsnNames,
    newTimestamp,
    threatScore = coalesce(threatScore, real(0)),
    threatLevel = coalesce(threatLevel, "unknown"),
    isThreat = coalesce(isThreat, false)
| sort by threatScore desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Detects domains that changed hosting ASN over time, indicating potential threat actor infrastructure migration.

properties.description: BgpAnomalyHunt_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.28

properties.query:
// MITRE ATT&CK: T1557 - Adversary-in-the-Middle
// Tactic: Collection, CredentialAccess
// Detects ASN reputation degradation by comparing scores across
// 24-hour windows, flagging increases greater than 20 points.
let lookback = 7d;
let scoreIncreaseThreshold = 20;
let windowSize = 24h;
let recentScores = WhisperASNReputation_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(windowSize)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by asn
| project asn, asnName, currentScore = reputationScore, currentLevel = reputationLevel, currentMaxThreat = maxThreatScore, currentAvgThreat = avgThreatScore, hasThreateningPrefixes, country, prefixCount, peerCount, currentTime = TimeGenerated;
let olderScores = WhisperASNReputation_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback) and TimeGenerated <= ago(windowSize)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by asn
| project asn, previousScore = reputationScore, previousLevel = reputationLevel, previousTime = TimeGenerated;
recentScores
| join kind=inner (olderScores) on asn
| extend scoreDelta = currentScore - previousScore
| where scoreDelta >= scoreIncreaseThreshold
| project
    asn,
    asnName,
    previousScore,
    previousLevel,
    previousTime,
    currentScore,
    currentLevel,
    currentTime,
    scoreDelta,
    currentMaxThreat,
    currentAvgThreat,
    hasThreateningPrefixes,
    country,
    prefixCount,
    peerCount
| extend indicator = tostring(asn)
| sort by scoreDelta desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Detects ASN reputation degradation by comparing scores across 24-hour windows, flagging increases greater than 20 points.

metadata.description: Sentinel playbook that extracts IP and domain entities from an incident and queries the Whisper Security knowledge graph to traverse the full infrastructure chain (IP, prefix, ASN, geolocation). Results are posted as an incident comment.

metadata.title: Whisper Security - Get WHOIS History
metadata.description: Sentinel incident trigger playbook that extracts DNS entities from an incident, calls the Whisper Security whisper.history(domain) API for WHOIS snapshots, and adds the results as an incident comment with registrar, registrant, and date information.
prerequisites: Azure Sentinel workspace
Whisper API key stored in Azure Key Vault
Key Vault secret URI for the Whisper API key

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Whisper Security solution for Microsoft Sentinel brings the Whisper internet-scale infrastructure knowledge graph (7+ billion nodes, 39+ billion edges, 40+ threat feeds) into Sentinel's detection and response workflows. It provides real-time threat intelligence enrichment, infrastructure context, WHOIS/BGP history, and ASN reputation polling.

Underlying Microsoft technologies used:

  • Azure Logic Apps for enrichment playbooks
  • Microsoft Sentinel custom tables for storing enriched threat/infrastructure data
  • Azure Key Vault for Whisper API key storage

Workbooks: 5, Analytic Rules: 8, Hunting Queries: 6, Playbooks: 10

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
